title: Install, Scope, Package, and Govern Skills · Extension Lens: Invocation Policy
summary: Move a proven local skill into a team-distributed package. Planned artifact: Add and verify the agent ext invocation policy increment in a distributable skill plugin. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Configure explicit or implicit invocation policy and declared dependencies.
Package skills and related extension assets in a valid plugin manifest.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
